name: Adjustable Kitchen Cabinet Shelf Pegs (Set of 16)
short: Sturdy replacement shelf support pegs that fit standard 5mm cabinet holes — no more sagging or wobbly shelves.
description: Stop digging through junk drawers for a missing shelf peg. This set of 16 precision-printed support pegs fits standard 5mm cabinet shelf holes found in most kitchen, bathroom, and closet cabinetry. Printed in durable PETG for long-term load support, each peg has a textured grip ring so it stays put even when shelves are loaded with dishes, pantry items, or glassware.
features: Fits standard 5mm cabinet shelf holes (most major brands)
Set of 16 — enough for 4 shelves with room to spare
Printed in tough, load-bearing PETG
Snug friction-fit grip prevents slipping
Available in matching cabinet-tone colors on request

name: Shopping Cart Quarter Coins (Set of 4)
short: Never hunt for a quarter again. Reusable shopping cart release coins that live on your keyring.
description: Skip the coin search at the grocery store. These reusable cart-release tokens are sized to fit the same coin slots as a quarter, so you can unlock a shopping cart instantly — then keep your actual quarters in your pocket. Comes with a keyring loop so you'll always have one on hand.
features: Fits standard quarter-release shopping carts
Set of 4 — keep one on every keyring or bag
Built-in keyring loop
Lightweight, pocket-friendly, rattle-free design
Available in 6 accent colors

name: Canada Post Shipping Box Slot Sizer Template
short: A reusable measuring template that instantly checks if your package fits Canada Post's small packet & parcel size tiers.
description: Built for home-based sellers and small businesses shipping with Canada Post. This rigid template has cut-out slots matching common Canada Post small packet, parcel, and oversized parcel size thresholds, so you can check your box dimensions in seconds — no tape measure, no guesswork, no surprise rate adjustments at the counter.
features: Slots correspond to common Canada Post size tiers
Durable, reusable PETG — won't bend like cardboard
Speeds up packing for high-volume sellers
Compact size, hangs on a hook near your packing station
Helps avoid oversize surcharges on shipments
specs: Note: a packing aid — always confirm final rates with Canada Post

name: Cable & Cord Winder (Set of 4)
short: Tangle-free cable management winders for chargers, earbuds, and small appliance cords.
description: Keep charging cables, earbud wires, and small appliance cords neat and tangle-free. Each winder has a center notch to lock the cord end in place and a wide spool body that prevents kinks and stress on your cables. Great for travel bags, desk drawers, and kitchen counters.
features: Set of 4 winders in assorted sizes
Center notch keeps cord ends secure
Smooth edges — won't damage cable insulation
Stackable for compact storage
Mix-and-match colors available

name: DIY Scratch & Win Card Scratcher Tool
short: An ergonomic scratcher tool for lottery and scratch-off cards — way better (and cleaner) than a coin.
description: Stop ruining your nails and shredding scratch cards with a coin. This ergonomic scratcher has a smooth, rounded edge designed to remove scratch-off coatings cleanly and evenly, without tearing the card underneath. Compact enough to keep in a wallet, glovebox, or junk drawer for whenever a scratch ticket shows up.
features: Smooth rounded edge won't tear cards
Ergonomic grip, comfortable for repeated use
Compact — fits in a wallet or glovebox
Reusable — no more lost coins or keys
Fun gift add-on for scratch ticket presents

name: Stacking Stevia & Sweetener Measuring Spoons (Set of 4)
short: Precision micro-measuring spoons for stevia, sweeteners, spices, and supplements — nests for compact storage.
description: Get consistent results with sweeteners and concentrated ingredients where a regular teaspoon is way too much. This set of 4 nesting micro-spoons covers the small measurements that matter most for stevia, baking spices, supplements, and coffee additions. They nest together for compact drawer storage and are dishwasher-safe.
features: Set of 4 nesting micro-measuring spoons
Ideal for stevia, sweeteners, spices & supplements
Nests into a compact stack for storage
Dishwasher-safe (top rack)
Food-safe PLA+ / PETG construction
specs: Sizes included: 1/16 tsp, 1/8 tsp, 1/4 tsp, 1/2 tsp

name: Easy-Grip Key Turner for Arthritis & Limited Mobility
short: A lever-style key holder that turns hard-to-grip keys with far less hand strain — great for arthritis and limited grip strength.
description: Designed for anyone who finds turning small keys painful or difficult. This ergonomic key turner clips onto your existing key and adds a wide, easy-grip lever, multiplying your turning leverage so doors, mailboxes, and padlocks become far easier to operate. A thoughtful, practical gift for parents, grandparents, or anyone managing arthritis or limited hand strength.
features: Adds leverage to reduce hand and wrist strain
Fits most standard house, mailbox & padlock keys
Large, easy-to-grip ergonomic handle
Lightweight and durable PETG construction
Thoughtful gift for accessibility needs
specs: Fits key blade widths up to 7mm
Each unit fits one key (multi-packs available)

name: Modular Bathroom Organizer System (4-Bin Set)
short: A snap-together modular bin system for bathroom drawers and cabinets — mix, match, and reconfigure as needed.
description: Reclaim your bathroom drawers and cabinets with a fully modular bin system. Each bin connects to its neighbors with interlocking edges, so you can build the exact layout your space needs — and reconfigure it any time your storage needs change. Perfect for organizing skincare, makeup, toiletries, and first-aid supplies.
features: 4 modular bins with interlocking connectors
Reconfigurable layout — adapts to any drawer or shelf
Smooth interior walls, easy to wipe clean
Stackable for vertical storage in cabinets
Expandable — add more bins anytime
specs: Color: Mixed (Clay / Sage / Cream) — custom sets available
